summary: Project involves payment processing with webhook integration directed to Zapier.

existing_features.title: In the admin payments panel (frontend/src/components/admin/payments/PaymentsPanel.tsx and related payment components), display the configured Zapier webhook URL so admins can verify it is set correctly. Add a read-only field or info badge showing the active payment webhook endpoint.

Fix the Admin Center access control so that the authenticated owner/admin user is recognized and granted admin access, resolving the 'Admin Access Required' lock screen shown in the screenshot. Ensure the access control initialization on page load correctly identifies the admin principal.

new_feature_requests.summary: Configure payment calls to direct to Zapier webhook: https://hooks.zapier.com/hooks/catch/26632326/u0i6cx6/

In the backend (main.mo), configure all outgoing payment notification/webhook HTTP outcalls to POST payment data to the Zapier webhook URL: https://hooks.zapier.com/hooks/catch/26632326/u0i6cx6/. This should fire whenever a payment event occurs (order payment, deposit, Stripe checkout completion, payout, or fee collection).
